name: The Universe
description:
༊*· touch the mega world ́ˎ˗

Explore the depths of space, explore distant planets, travel to the center of a black hole and back, do literally anything you want!

My identity ends with my own humanity and the inability to travel as some kind of intangible object 😔 but no one stops me from exploiting AI to eat a neutron star 😈
